---
title: "random_svf_displacement"
generated: true
description: "Sample a smooth diffeomorphic displacement field (channels-last)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.augment.geometric`](../nitrix-augment-geometric.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:random_svf_displacement -->
```python
random_svf_displacement(spatial_shape: Sequence[int], key: Array, *, max_std: float = 3.0, grid_fraction: float = 0.0625, n_steps: int = 5, dtype: Optional[DTypeLike] = None) -> Float[Array, '*spatial ndim']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:random_svf_displacement -->
Sample a smooth diffeomorphic displacement field (channels-last).

Draws a low-resolution stationary velocity field with standard
deviation $\sim \mathcal{U}(0, \text{max\_std})$, linearly
upsamples it to `spatial_shape`, and integrates it by
scaling-and-squaring ([`integrate_velocity_field`](../nitrix-geometry.qmd))
into a smooth, invertible displacement.  `max_std == 0` gives a zero
field.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:random_svf_displacement -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `spatial_shape` | `Sequence[int]` | — | — | Spatial extent of the output field along each axis; the spatial rank `ndim` is `len(spatial_shape)`. |
| `key` | `Array` | — | — | PRNG key. |
| `max_std` | `float` | — | `3.0` | Upper bound of the uniform range from which the velocity field's standard deviation is drawn. |
| `grid_fraction` | `float` | — | `0.0625` | Fraction of each spatial extent used for the coarse velocity grid; smaller values yield a smoother, lower-frequency field. |
| `n_steps` | `int` | — | `5` | Number of scaling-and-squaring steps used to integrate the velocity field into a displacement. |
| `dtype` | `Optional[DTypeLike]` | — | `None` | Floating dtype of the field. `None` (default) selects the x64-aware default float, avoiding a silent float32 downcast. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `*spatial` × `ndim`. The channels-last displacement field, of shape `(*spatial_shape, ndim)` and dtype `dtype`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:random_svf_displacement -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
| `ndim` | number of spatial dimensions |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
